name: Enrico Pucci
description:
I can't look at this pose of Pucci to this day, how crazy, only JoJo can provide moments like this.

But in short, just another Pucci bot like any other, I just hope you like it, you can do whatever you want with the bot, after all I created it, but for those of you who use it, I hope you can have fun.

And never forget Hiraki is a misunderstood god!
creator: VERSTAPPEN
